name: Chocolate Angel Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites in a large bowl until soft peaks form.
2. Add the cream of tartar and vanilla extract, and beat until foamy.
3. Gradually add 3/4 cup sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together the remaining sugar, flour, and cocoa powder.
5. Gently fold the dry ingredients into the egg white mixture using a spatula.
6. Pour the batter into an ungreased tube pan.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45 minutes until set and golden brown.
Note: Avoid aggressive culinary slang in your instructions.
